title: aespa’s “Drama” Becomes Their Fastest MV To Hit 300 Million Views
content:
aespa has just set a personal record on YouTube! Shortly after 11:20 p.m. KST on June 21, aespa’s music video for their 2023 hit “Drama”  surpassed 300 million views on YouTube, making it their second music video to do so after “Next Level.” aespa first released the music video for “Drama” on November 10, 2023… Continue reading aespa’s “Drama” Becomes Their Fastest MV To Hit 300 Million Views
The post aespa’s “Drama” Becomes Their Fastest MV To Hit 300 Million Views appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: aespa《Drama》MV突破3亿次观看，创自身最快纪录
facts_list: 2024年6月21日晚11点20分（KST），aespa歌曲《Drama》MV在YouTube上突破3亿次观看
该MV于2023年11月10日发布，是aespa继《Next Level》后第二支达到3亿次观看的MV
《Drama》成为aespa最快达到3亿次观看的MV
summary_zh: aespa的《Drama》MV于6月21日晚11点20分（KST）在YouTube上突破3亿次观看，成为她们继《Next Level》后第二支达到此里程碑的MV，同时也是她们最快达到3亿次观看的MV。该MV于2023年11月10日发布。

title: ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ was a ‘bright spot’ in a year of declining diversity among streaming films, study finds - The Spokesman-Review
content: ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ was a ‘bright spot’ in a year of declining diversity among streaming films, study finds The Spokesman-Review
title_zh: 研究：流媒体电影多样性下降，《KPop Demon Hunters》成亮点
facts_list: 一项研究发现，2023年流媒体电影多样性整体下降
《KPop Demon Hunters》被该研究称为‘bright spot’（亮点）
summary_zh: 一项研究发现，在流媒体电影多样性整体下降的年份中，《KPop Demon Hunters》被视为一个亮点。该研究未提供具体数据，仅指出该片在多样性方面表现突出。

title: Parc Jae Jung To Change Fan Club Name Due To Overlap With Different Artist
content:
Parc Jae Jung will be changing his recently announced fandom name. Earlier this week, Parc Jae Jung’s agency Romantic Factory announced that the singer’s official fan club name would be “Namu” (the Korean word for “tree”). However, some fans of veteran singer Park Hyo Shin objected to the name, pointing out that “Namu” was a… Continue reading Parc Jae Jung To Change Fan Club Name Due To Overlap With Different Artist
The post Parc Jae Jung To Change Fan Club Name Due To Overlap With Different Artist appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: Parc Jae Jung因与前辈歌手朴孝信粉丝名重叠，将更改新公布的粉丝名
facts_list: 本周早些时候，Parc Jae Jung的所属社Romantic Factory宣布其官方粉丝名为“Namu”（韩语意为“树”）
资深歌手朴孝信的粉丝指出“Namu”与朴孝信的粉丝名重叠，提出异议
Parc Jae Jung决定更改粉丝名
summary_zh: Parc Jae Jung的所属社Romantic Factory本周早些时候宣布其官方粉丝名为“Namu”（韩语“树”），但遭到前辈歌手朴孝信粉丝的反对，认为该名称与朴孝信的粉丝名重叠。因此，Parc Jae Jung决定更改粉丝名。

title: June Girl Group Member Brand Reputation Rankings Announced
content:
The Korean Business Research Institute has revealed this month’s brand reputation rankings for individual girl group members! The rankings were determined through an analysis of the consumer participation, media coverage, communication, and community awareness indexes of 735 girl group members, using big data collected from May 21 to June 21. title_zh: 6月女团成员品牌评价排名公布：张员瑛蝉联第一
facts_list: 韩国企业评价研究所于6月21日发布6月女团成员品牌评价排名
排名基于5月21日至6月21日收集的735名女团成员大数据，分析消费者参与度、媒体覆盖、沟通及社区意识指数
IVE成员张员瑛连续位居榜首
summary_zh: 韩国企业评价研究所公布6月女团成员品牌评价排名，基于5月21日至6月21日对735名女团成员的大数据分析，IVE成员张员瑛蝉联第一。

title: BLACKPINK’s “JUMP” Becomes 1st K-Pop MV Released In 2025 To Hit 400 Million Views
content:
BLACKPINK has hit the 400 million mark with yet another music video! On the morning of June 21 KST, BLACKPINK’s music video for their hit single “JUMP” surpassed 400 million views on YouTube, making it the first music video released by a K-pop artist in 2025 to reach the milestone. title_zh: BLACKPINK《JUMP》MV观看量破4亿，成2025年首支达此成就的K-Pop MV
facts_list: 6月21日上午KST，BLACKPINK《JUMP》MV在YouTube观看量突破4亿次
该MV是2025年发布的K-Pop MV中首支达到4亿观看量的作品
summary_zh: BLACKPINK的《JUMP》MV于6月21日上午KST在YouTube上突破4亿观看量，成为2025年发布的K-Pop MV中首支达到该里程碑的作品。

title: Winners Of The 35th Seoul Music Awards
content:
On June 20, the 35th Seoul Music Awards (SMA) were held at the INSPIRE Arena in Incheon. ATEEZ won this year’s Daesang (Grand Prize), in addition to taking home one of this year’s Bonsangs (Main Awards). Meanwhile, BOYNEXTDOOR snagged a total of four awards, including Best Album, World Best Artist, the R&B/Hip Hop Award, and… Continue reading Winners Of The 35th Seoul Music Awards
The post Winners Of The 35th Seoul Music Awards appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: 第35届首尔歌谣大赏获奖名单揭晓，ATEEZ获大赏
facts_list: 第35届首尔歌谣大赏于6月20日在仁川INSPIRE Arena举行
ATEEZ获得年度大赏（Daesang）及本赏（Bonsang）
BOYNEXTDOOR获得最佳专辑奖、World Best Artist奖、R&B/Hip Hop奖等共四个奖项
summary_zh: 第35届首尔歌谣大赏于6月20日在仁川INSPIRE Arena举行。ATEEZ获得年度大赏及本赏。BOYNEXTDOOR共获得四个奖项，包括最佳专辑奖、World Best Artist奖、R&B/Hip Hop奖等。
